patch_description: Proposes a parameter-efficient revision of the ANSATZ_SPEC by sharing the hub-edge CRX parameter across all four center-to-edge connections. This reduces the per-block parameter count (from 13 keys to 10 keys), lowering total parameters from 78 to 60 given the same N_UPLOADS and N_REPEATS, while preserving the symmetry and data-uploading structure. The change aims to improve training efficiency and generalization without altering inputs/outputs or the fixed data/feature-map/training loop. All gates remain on allowed adjacent grid edges, and the overall ansatz topology (pre-RZ, RY, CZ ring, hub entanglement, post-RZ) is preserved.
